name: Mexi-Cali Layered Dip
recipeIngredient: Ripe Avocado, Peeled - Seeded and Mashed
1/2 cup Shredded Cheddar or Monterey Jack Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mashed avocado, 2 tablespoons Pace Picante Sauce, lemon juice, and salt in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Stir in the chopped tomato.
3. Spoon the mixture evenly onto the bottom of a shallow 1-quart clear glass bowl with straight sides.
4. Top with olives.
5. Cover and chill.
6. To serve, spread the sour cream evenly over the olives.
7. Spoon the remaining Pace Picante Sauce over the sour cream and sprinkle with cheese.
8. Serve with tortilla chips or corn chips. Makes about 3-1/2 cups dip.
